fields.name: arming time:seconds#won't detonate before this time elapses
minimum velocity:world units per second#detonates when slowed below this velocity
maximum range:world units#detonates after travelling this distance
bounce maximum range:world units#detonates after travelling this distance, but is reset after a bounce.  Combines with maximum range
material effect radius#radius within we will generate material effects
air gravity scale#the proportion of normal gravity applied to the projectile when in air.
air damage range:world units#the range over which damage is scaled when the projectile is in air.
water gravity scale#the proportion of normal gravity applied to the projectile when in water.
water damage range:world units#the range over which damage is scaled when the projectile is in water.
initial velocity:world units per second#bullet's velocity when inflicting maximum damage
final velocity:world units per second#bullet's velocity when inflicting minimum damage
ai velocity scale (normal):[0-1]#scale on the initial velocity when fired by the ai on normal difficulty
ai velocity scale (legendary):[0-1]#scale on the initial velocity when fired by the ai on legendary difficulty (0 defaults to 1.0)
guided angular velocity at rest:degrees per second
acceleration range:world units#what distance range the projectile goes from initial velocity to final velocity
acceleration scale:[0,+inf]#marine 1.0, grunt 1.4, elite 0.9, hunter 0.5, etc.
dynamic light sphere radius#sphere to use for dynamic lights and shadows. only used if not 0
dynamic light sphere offset#only used if radius not 0
only set this tag if you want to override the default collision damage values in globals.globals
melee sound#this is the sound that is made when I am meleed.  This overrides the sweetener sound of my material.
ai type name#used for combat dialogue, etc.
turn off with#if the specified function is off, so is this function
min value#function must exceed this value (after mapping) to be active 0. means do nothing
variant name#if empty, may be used by any model variant
GAME ENGINE INCLUSION
fields.definition: Set which game engines you desire this object to appear in

fields.name: TYPE AND FLAGS
fields.definition:
Type pertains to how you want the game engine to handle this object
Certain flags applicable only to certain object types, should be self evident

fields.name: GOAL & RESPAWN ZONE BOUNDARY DATA
fields.definition: These fields are only used for goal area objects with boundaries, and for respawn zones

fields.name: SPAWNING DATA
fields.definition: These fields are used for default spawning times and remapping

fields.name: MORE GOAL & RESPAWN ZONE OBJECT BOUNDARY
fields.definition: These fields are only used for goal area objects with boundaries, and for respawn zones

fields.name: RESPAWN ZONE DATA
fields.definition: These are respawn zone weights, used only for respawn zones

fields.name: MARKER DATA
fields.definition: These fields are only used for defining certain, special markers to use for positional locations if the default position (object origin) is not sufficient

fields.name: SPAWNED OBJECT
fields.definition: If this object is intended to spawn something, the object it spawns should be specified here

fields.name: BOUNDARY SHADER - DEFAULT
fields.definition: These are default shaders used for boundary geometry

fields.name: BOUNDARY SHADER - SPHERE
fields.definition: These are custom shaders used for spherical boundary geometry

fields.name: BOUNDARY SHADER - CYLINDER
fields.definition: These are custom shaders used for cylindrical boundary geometry

fields.name: BOUNDARY SHADER - BOX
fields.definition: These are custom shaders used for box boundary geometry

fields.name: default result
fields.definition: (if the potential result, below, fails to happen)

fields.name: angular noise:degrees#the angle of incidence is randomly perturbed by at most this amount to simulate irregularity.
velocity noise:world units per second#the velocity is randomly perturbed by at most this amount to simulate irregularity.
initial friction#the fraction of the projectile's velocity lost on penetration
maximum distance#the maximum distance the projectile can travel through on object of this material
parallel friction#the fraction of the projectile's velocity parallel to the surface lost on impact
perpendicular friction#the fraction of the projectile's velocity perpendicular to the surface lost on impact
distribution exponent#exp==.5 even distribution, exp==1  halo2 distribution, exp>1== weighted towards center

options: search cardinal direction lightmaps on failure
extension of parent#object passes all function values to parent and uses parent's markers
attach to clusters by dynamic sphere#use this for the mac gun on spacestation
effects created by this object do not spawn objects in multiplayer
does not collide with camera#specificly the flying observer camera
damage not blocked by obstructions#AOE damage being applied to this object does not test for obstrutions.
invert#result of function is one minus actual result
mapping does not controls active#the curve mapping can make the function active/inactive
always active#function does not deactivate when at or below lower bound
random time offset#function offsets periodic function input by random value between 0 and 1
always exports value#when this function is deactivated, it still exports its value
turn off with uses magnitude#the function will be turned off if the value of the turns_off_with function is 0
blend in hsv#blends colors in hsv rather than rgb space
...more colors#blends colors through more hues (goes the long way around the color wheel)
after first bounce off any surface
only against units (except giants){only against units}
never against units (except giants){never against units}
